ndvi.note: Array of NDVI bin counts. Exact values depend on live GEE data.

notes: Straightforward NDVI query. Should succeed on first attempt using the ndvi_delhi_2023 template.

query: compare ndvi of mumbai vs chennai for 2022

expected_result_sample.comparison: Array with mean NDVI for each region

notes: Comparison query. ComparisonEngine parses 'vs' and runs two sub-queries.
Water index query. Landsat-8 selected automatically (state-level area).

query: forest change western ghats from 2015 to 2023

expected_result_sample.time_series: Array of annual NBR mean values from 2015 to 2023

notes: Multi-year time-series query. May require one self-correction attempt due to large region size triggering memory constraints.

query: evi of jaipur for 2022 using sentinel-2

evi.note: EVI values typically range from 0.0 to 0.9 for vegetation.

notes: Explicit satellite override. SatelliteSelector uses Sentinel-2 per user instruction.
